reviews.comment:
Nos dejaron esperando 1 hora por cambio de turno y el combustible está 45 pesos más caro por litro que en otras ypf

(Translated by Google)
They left us waiting for an hour due to a shift change, and fuel is 45 pesos more expensive per liter than at other YPF locations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoZzQ3VFZREAE

reviews.comment:
Es la segunda vez que paso por Jachal a cargar combustible y siendo las 13hs del mediodía se ponen a arreglar las luces y controlar el stock de combustible, haciendo esperar y demorar a los clientes.

(Translated by Google)
This is the second time I've passed through Jachal to refuel, and at 1 PM they start fixing the lights and checking the fuel stock, making customers wait and causing delays.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoZzZhc2pnRRAB
